summary: Fixed critical bugs: Node.js backend was missing 'attraction' category in Zod validation schema and TypeScript types (causing attraction filter to fail with 400 errors). Added result limit (default 500) to both Python and Node.js backends to prevent 22K+ location responses crashing the browser. Removed verbose per-location console.log. Frontend now passes limit=500. All category filters including attraction now work correctly.
next_action: Consider adding marker clustering (leaflet.markercluster) for better map UX with 500 markers
